title: Self-similar Dirichlet form on pillow-type carpets--a short analytic construction
author_string: Shiping Cao, Hua Qiu, Yizhou Wang
abstract: We give a short, self-contained analytic proof of the existence of self-similar Dirichlet forms on pillow-type carpets, a family of infinitely ramified fractals that includes the Sierpiński carpet.
